items.headline: Redick hails LeBron’s greatness as injury-hit Lakers oust Rockets in 6
items.description: LeBron James led L.A. to the semifinals despite being without co-star Luka Dončić, and Austin Reaves' limited availability.

items.headline: Jayson Tatum (knee) out against 76ers in Game 7
items.description: Celtics forward Jayson Tatum (left knee stiffness) is sidelined for Boston's win-or-go-home game against Philadelphia.

items.headline: 4 takeaways: Tyrese Maxey closes the deal, shots don't fall for Boston and the 76ers advance

items.headline: Starting 5: Cade drives historic comeback, RJ gets OT bounce, Sixers-Celtics tonight
items.description: Sixers-Celtics Game 7 today, LeBron & Lakers advance to face Thunder, Pistons rally from down 24 and RJ Barrett sinks wild 3 in OT.

items.headline: Trending Topics: Who will win the Game 7s this weekend?

items.headline: How Detroit escaped elimination in Orlando with a stunning comeback
items.description: The Pistons were facing elimination and down by 24 points, on the road, in the second half before storming back.

items.headline: Hawks' Dyson Daniels, Knicks' Mitchell Robinson fined for altercation
items.description: Both players escalated the altercation with Robinson continuing to aggressively pursue Daniels after the players had been separated.

items.headline: Raptors' Brandon Ingram out for Game 6 against Cavaliers with sore right heel
items.description: Raptors coach Darko Rajakovic said F Brandon Ingram will miss Game 6 against the Cavaliers because of a sore right heel.

items.description: The Magic guard was the first person to be named Minnesota Mr. Basketball and Mr. Football in the same year.

items.headline: 4 takeaways: LeBron James continues closeout success as Lakers move on to challenge OKC
items.description: The Lakers live by the 3, the Rockets are felled by bricks, and LeBron James sends yet another opponent home in Game 6.
